column1: # ZAP rules configuration for VulnShop DAST
# Thresholds: IGNORE | INFO | LOW | MEDIUM | HIGH
# This file controls the alerting level for each ZAP passive/active rule.
# Because this application is intentionally vulnerable, we set all rules
# to MEDIUM (default) or LOW so they appear in reports without causing
# ZAP to exit with a non-zero code that would block the pipeline.
# To suppress a rule entirely, set its threshold to IGNORE.
# We deliberately do NOT ignore any rules — all findings should be surfaced.
# --- Informational rules (keep at INFO so they appear in reports) ---
